---
title: "Data Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Notebooks

- `01_fixed_data.ipynb`: Preprocesses and cleans raw data from cepii.
- `02_cultural_trade_data.ipynb`: Preprocesses and cleans raw trade data from the OECD BIMTS bulk data files at 2 digit HS code level.
- `03_aggregating_reproducible_trade_data.ipynb`: Loads cleaned data on reproducible cultural trade and aggregates it to a single csv file.
- `04_aggregating_total_trade_data.ipynb`: Estimates a structural gravity model.
Estimates a structural gravity model.
Each notebook is annotated with clear step-by-step instructions and expected outputs.
